title: Vanilla Plus
description: A mod package that improves vanilla Minecraft in performance and features
body:
A modpack that improves vanilla Minecraft in performance and features Supported versions: 1.20.X, 1.21.X Current Version: 1.3.0
Mods - 3D Skin Layers - AppleSkin - Architectury API - Chat Heads - Cloth Config API - ESSENTIAL Mod - Dynamic Crosshair - ESSENTIAL Mod - FabricAPI - Fabric Language Kotlin - Freelook - Indium - Iris Shaders - Lithium - Mod Menu - Roughly Enough Items (REI) - Shulker Box Tooltips - Sodium - Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play) - Xaero's World Map - YetAnotherConfigLib - Zoomify
Ressource Packs - Faithful - Default Dark Mode - No Pumpkin Blur
Shader - Complementary Reimagined
Changes Things that have been changed - Zoomify: - The zoom button has been set to **Z** - Xaeros's Minimap: - The button for enlarging the minimap has been changed to **C**
## Info: This modpack is not finished yet and new mods/ressourcepacks/shaders will be added. If you have any problems or mod suggestions, please report them to me on GitHub at [“Issues”]([https://github.com/danielvici/Vanilla-Plus/issues](https://github.com/danielvici/Vanilla-Plus/issues)). If you don't want your mod to be part of the modpack then contact me here: **danielvici@pm.me**. If you have other concerns do not hesitate to contact me. All used mods/shaderpacks/resourcepacks are listed [here]([https://github.com/danielvici/Vanilla-Plus/wiki/Sources](https://github.com/danielvici/Vanilla-Plus/wiki/Sources)) with links to the Modrinth page.
